titleStmt.title: SII 23.388: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 388. (A.R. No. 388 of 1907.) Maruttuvakkuḍi, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Airāvatēśvara temple—on the same wall Kōṉēriṉmaikoṇḍāṉ: year 21

summary.p: This may also be an inscription of Rājarāja III, whose order issued on the 274th day of the year quoted, through the Tirumandiravōlai Mīnavaṉ-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ to his officers and to the temple, grants uḷvari for some land given tax-free for the expenses of worship. Like No. 387 above, this also quotes the 40th year of the previous king. The details of the transaction are lost owing to the badly damaged state of the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ceytaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭi svastiśrī . tribhu
vanaccakkaravatti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ Uyyakkoṇṭār
vaḷa nāṭṭut tiraimūr nāṭṭu Āṉaiccūḻ Uṭaiyār tiruviṭai
kkuḷa muṭaiyār ko śrīmāheśvarakkaṇ
ṭaiyārkku veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa
vaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭut ti
yiliyāṉa nilattuk kuṟumpūr nāṭṭu Irumarapu t
toṭum kūṭiṉa nilamāy māṟiṉa nilam nāṉmāvaraiye kkiḻaraikkut teva
ttapaṭi koyiṟkaṇakkup perumpuliyūruṭaiyāṉ kaṇakkup peṟu
ccaruppetimaṅkalattoṭum vikkiramacoḻaccaruppetimaṅkalattu niṉṟum kū
ṭiṉa nilattu tiruviṭaikkuḷamuṭaiyār tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa ttukku Ūrkaṇakku
kaṇṇamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttiṭṭa kaṇakkuppaṭi nilam Araiye nālumāmukkā
ṇiyaraikkāṇimuntirikaiyum Irupattoṉṟāvatu Iṟai
yiliyāka Iṭṭum Innilattukku Iṟaikaṭṭum niccayippum kaṇṭāl Eṟiṉa
ku Antarāyam koḷkaik kāṇikkaṭaṉ veli Oṉṟukku nellu nūṟṟukkalattiṉāl pattāṟākki Aṟu
patiṉkalamāka Iṟaikaṭṭiyum Innilattukku Āḻvārkku nāṟpatāvatu varaiyil taṇṭa
nellil tarappaṭiyāka Iṟuttu varukiṟa
yum Ūrilk kaṇakkiliṭakkaṭavatāka variyilārum varikkūṟu cey vār
kaḷum Uḷvari taraccoṉṉom Innilam Irupattoṉṟāvatu pacāṉa mutal tiru
yārkkut tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākak kaikkoṇṭu nivantam celuttap paṇ
ṇuka Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiraolai miṉavaṉ muventaveḷāṉ Ivai cetiyarāyaṉ Eḻutte
ṉṟum Ivai rāyaṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ivai viḻuppātirāyaṉ Eḻut teṉṟum
Ivai Ilaṅkeśvaraṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ivai kāṅkeyarāyaṉ Eḻutteṉ ṟum yāṇ
ṭu Irupattoṉṟāvatu nāḷ Irunūṟṟeḻupattu nāliṉāl prasādam ceytaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭi
kalveṭṭu:—
Digital edition of SII 23.388 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
